quick_skim.title: Federated learning with heavy-tailed gradient noise and communication noise: a variance-reduction based algorithm
quick_skim.abstract: Federated learning (FL) is an emerging distributed machine learning paradigm that enables local devices to jointly train a global model while keeping data decentralized and private. We propose a variance-reduction based algorithm, VRA-FedSGD, for FL in the presence of heavy-tailed gradient noise and communication noise, where these noises are prevalent in large-scale machine learning over wireless networks and Internet of Things deployments. VRA-FedSGD employs a momentum variance reduction technique together with a nonlinear mapping to mitigate heavy-tailed gradient noise, and uses a variance-reduced aggregation mechanism to suppress heavy-tailed communication noise. In the mean sense, VRA-FedSGD achieves a convergence rate of {\small$\mathcal{O}\left(K^{-(p-1)/(2p-1)}\right)$} for nonconvex objective functions, where $p$ is the tail index of heavy-tailed noise. In the almost sure sense, VRA-FedSGD achieves a convergence rate of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(K^{-(1-1/(p-ε))}\right)$ for strongly convex objective functions, where $ε$ is an arbitrarily small constant. Simulated experiments on a logistic regression problem with real-world data verify the effectiveness of VRA-FedSGD.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: variance-reduction algorithm for federated learning with communication noise
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 针对通信噪声的联邦学习方差缩减算法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 针对通信噪声的联邦学习方差缩减算法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 针对通信噪声的联邦学习方差缩减算法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: VRA-FedSGD is a variance-reduction algorithm for federated learning that handles heavy-tailed gradient and communication noise using momentum variance reduction and nonlinear mapping.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 联邦学习中梯度噪声和通信噪声常呈现重尾分布，影响模型收敛。VRA-FedSGD结合动量方差缩减和非线性映射缓解重尾梯度噪声，并采用方差缩减聚合机制抑制通信噪声，理论证明在重尾噪声下达到最优收敛速率。实验验证了算法在无线网络和物联网场景下的鲁棒性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 联邦学习中梯度噪声和通信噪声常呈现重尾分布，影响模型收敛。VRA-FedSGD结合动量方差缩减和非线性映射缓解重尾梯度噪声，并采用方差缩减聚合机制抑制通信噪声，理论证明在重尾噪声下达到最优收敛速率。实验验证了算法在无线网络和物联网场景下的鲁棒性。

quick_skim.title: Semi-asynchronous Federated Learning in Flower: Framework Extension and Performance Assessment
quick_skim.abstract: This paper presents an extension of the Flower federated learning framework to support Semi-Asynchronous Federated Learning. The proposed approach adapts the traditional synchronous paradigm to better handle client heterogeneity and straggler effects. By introducing a semi-asynchronous training strategy, the system allows partial synchronization among clients while maintaining training efficiency and scalability. We implement and evaluate the proposed modification within Flower, instantiated as the FedSaSync strategy, demonstrating improved robustness and reduced idle time compared to fully synchronous baselines in heterogeneous environments. The results show that SAFL can balance convergence stability and system efficiency in heterogeneous environments typical of edge and distributed learning scenarios.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Semi-asynchronous federated learning that handles client heterogeneity and stragglers
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 半异步联邦学习处理客户端异构和掉队者
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 半异步联邦学习处理客户端异构和掉队者
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 半异步联邦学习处理客户端异构和掉队者
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper extends the Flower framework to support Semi-Asynchronous Federated Learning (SAFL) to improve robustness and reduce idle time in heterogeneous environments.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 联邦学习中客户端异构性导致同步训练效率低下。本文在Flower框架中扩展支持半异步联邦学习（SAFL），允许部分客户端异步更新，减少空闲时间。实验表明SAFL在异构环境下比纯同步方法更鲁棒且高效，为分布式训练提供了异步执行参考。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 联邦学习中客户端异构性导致同步训练效率低下。本文在Flower框架中扩展支持半异步联邦学习（SAFL），允许部分客户端异步更新，减少空闲时间。实验表明SAFL在异构环境下比纯同步方法更鲁棒且高效，为分布式训练提供了异步执行参考。
